user.title: Connect to Khouch
user.description: Your Khouch server URL and login.

data_description.url: e.g. https://iptv.example.com — editable later via Reconfigure.

reconfigure.title: Update Khouch connection
reconfigure.description: Change the Khouch URL or login. Used if your Khouch hostname changes.

abort.already_configured: This Khouch server is already configured.

search.name: Search the Khouch catalog
search.description: Search live channels, movies, and series; returns all matches with a ref for each.

kind.name: Kind
kind.description: Limit to live, movie, or series.

play.name: Play a Khouch result
play.description: Stream one search result (by ref) to a media player.

ref.name: Ref
ref.description: The ref from a khouch.search result.
